ext_description.message: Client-side wallet for the Keryx Network (KRX). Create or import a wallet and track your balance — keys never leave your device.
ext_description.description: SAFETY-CRITICAL: store listing + security promise; needs native review.

approval_unlock_hint.message: Enter your session password to review this request.

approval_expired_body.message: This request has expired or was already handled.

approval_connect_hint.message: The site will see the selected account’s address, public key, balance and UTXOs, and may ask you to approve transactions. It never gets your keys.
approval_connect_hint.description: SAFETY-CRITICAL: explains what a dApp connection exposes; needs native review.

approval_signmsg_hint.message: Signing proves this message came from your account. It cannot move funds.
approval_signmsg_hint.description: SAFETY-CRITICAL: reassures message-signing can't move funds; needs native review.

approval_custom_script_warn.message: ⚠ Spends custom script(s) — e.g. an HTLC claim or refund. Make sure you trust this site.
approval_custom_script_warn.description: SAFETY-CRITICAL: custom-script spend warning; needs native review.

approval_broadcast_yes.message: The transaction will be broadcast to the network immediately after signing.
approval_broadcast_yes.description: SAFETY-CRITICAL: tells the user the tx goes on-chain now; needs native review.

approval_broadcast_no.message: The signed transaction is returned to the site — the wallet does NOT broadcast it.
approval_broadcast_no.description: SAFETY-CRITICAL: tells the user the wallet won't broadcast; needs native review.

home_subtitle.message: Client-side wallet — private keys never leave your device

home_hint.message: Private keys stay in your browser — they never leave your machine.

backup_mnemonic_label.message: Mnemonic phrase (24 words) — save it in a safe place

backup_confirm_saved.message: I have saved my mnemonic phrase. I understand that without it, I cannot recover my funds.
backup_confirm_saved.description: SAFETY-CRITICAL: backup acknowledgement; needs native review.

setpw_intro.message: One password protects your whole wallet in this browser — every account you add is secured by it. You’ll use it instead of the mnemonic on future visits.

setpw_hint.message: Password is never stored. It encrypts your seed phrases on this device.
setpw_hint.description: SAFETY-CRITICAL: password/seed security promise; needs native review.

err_invalid_mnemonic.message: Invalid mnemonic — check spelling and word count.

err_seed_already_added.message: This seed phrase is already added.

import_hint.message: Password is never stored. To remove your wallet, click "Reset" or clear extension data.

addacct_derive_hint.message: Derives $1 from $2’s seed phrase — nothing new to back up.

addacct_hint.message: All accounts are secured by your one session password.

settings_connected_hint.message: Sites that can see your address and request transaction approvals via window.keryx.

settings_network_hint.message: API host used for balances, history and broadcasting. Leave empty for the official host. Use https:// (http:// only for localhost). A custom host must allow CORS (a self-hosted Keryx indexer does).

settings_backup_hint.message: Reveals a seed phrase after re-entering your password.

settings_danger_hint.message: Reset removes ALL accounts and the encrypted vault from this browser. Funds are only recoverable with the seed phrases — make sure every one of them is backed up before continuing.
settings_danger_hint.description: SAFETY-CRITICAL: wallet-reset warning; needs native review.

inf_prompt_placeholder.message: Enter your query for the Keryx network…

inf_no_miners.message: ⚠ No active miners for $1 — request would stay pending, fees lost.

inf_submitted_hint.message: Miners pick it up within the next blocks — watch the feed below.

inf_footer.message: Prompt goes on-chain in an AiRequest tx · miners run the model · result lands on IPFS.

backup_warning.message: Your seed phrase is the master key to your funds — anyone who sees it can steal them. Make sure no one is watching your screen and never enter it on any website.
backup_warning.description: SAFETY-CRITICAL: seed-phrase reveal warning; needs native review.

send_dest_placeholder.message: keryx:q… or pick from the list

title_max.message: Send entire available balance minus fee

send_footer.message: UTXOs are fetched only when you send. Minimum fee: 0.3 KRX.

locked_reset_confirm.message: Remove ALL accounts and the encrypted vault from this browser? Make sure every seed phrase is backed up.
locked_reset_confirm.description: SAFETY-CRITICAL: destructive reset confirm; needs native review.

locked_use_different.message: Use a different wallet (clear all data)

dash_consolidate.message: Consolidate — coming in the next release.
